General.Name: CNGR Advanced Material Co., Ltd.
General.Description: CNGR Advanced Material Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of energy battery materials. The company offers ternary precursors, cobaltosic oxide, binary and multicomponent precussors; iron phosphate; and sodium-ion battery precusors, as well as nickel-based, cobalt-based, and phosphorus-based materials cathode active material precursors, and hydroxycobalt. It is also involved in the sale of new energy metal products, metals trading, and resales of raw materials, as well as contract manufacturing services. The company's products are used in lithium-ion batteries that are widely used in EV, ESS, consumer electronics, AI-enabled consumer electronic devices, humanoid robotics, and low-altitude aerial vehicles. It operates in United States, Mainland China, Singapore, Indonesia, South Korea, Hong Kong, internationally. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Tongren, the People's Republic of China.
